SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Our Story in Your Neighborhood

Eagle Shield Roofing began when founder Mark Reynolds noticed how Dallas' severe weather exposed homeowners to unnecessary risks. What started as a small crew repairing hail damage in Lake Highlands has grown into a 20+ team serving all of DFW.

We believe your roof is more than shingles—it's your family's first defense against Texas storms. That's why we use only premium materials rated for our climate and stand behind every installation with industry-leading warranties.

When we're not replacing roofs in Preston Hollow or repairing storm damage in Arlington, you'll find us sponsoring Little League teams and volunteering with Habitat for Humanity. This community raised us—we're proud to give back.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Eagle Shield Roofing

Local Weather Expertise

We specify materials that stand up to Dallas' hail storms and summer heat waves, not generic national standards.

Historic Home Specialists

From Bishop Arts bungalows to Highland Park Colonials, we preserve architectural character while upgrading protection.

Storm Response Team

24/7 emergency repairs when tornadoes or ice storms hit, with direct insurance claims assistance.

No-Pressure Consultations

Honest assessments about whether you need repairs or full replacement, with transparent pricing.

Schedule Your Free Roof Evaluation

Our Dallas-based team will assess your roof's condition and explain all options with no obligation.

Get a Free Estimate Call (214) 555-0733

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

When the hailstorm hit our Preston Hollow home last April, Eagle Shield had our roof tarped within hours—even though it was Sunday. Their detailed documentation helped us get full insurance coverage for the replacement. The crew took extra care around our antique clay roof tiles.

James T. Storm Damage Repair
“

Our Deep Ellum music venue had chronic leaks until Eagle Shield installed a custom TPO system. They worked nights to avoid disrupting shows and trained our maintenance staff on simple inspections. Two Texas summers later—still bone dry inside.

Lisa R. Commercial Roofing

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if I need repairs or full replacement?
We evaluate multiple factors including shingle granule loss, moisture penetration in decking, and the age of your current roof. In Dallas' climate, most asphalt roofs need replacement by 12-15 years.
Will you help with my insurance claim?
Our DFW storm damage specialists document all hail/wind damage per carrier requirements and can meet with adjusters directly.
